title: Add KPSS Zamanı to learn
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [KPSS Zamanı](https://kpsszamani.com) to learn
- KPSS is an annual exam in Türkiye for selecting candidates for government positions. KPSS Zamanı helps you study for the exam on your mobile.

Fixes #10697

gist.headline: Study time in the greenhouse
gist.blurb: The community greenhouse just got a little smarter! KPSS Zamanı has joined the showcase to help students in Türkiye prep for their government exams.
gist.summary: Added KPSS Zamanı, a mobile study companion for Türkiye's government placement exams, to the community app showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover KPSS Zamanı in the apps directory and see how Pollinations is being used to build educational tools.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee studying in a greenhouse. The robot holding a mobile phone with a quiz. Represents the addition of a mobile study app to the community greenhouse.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, studying a stack of books inside a lush greenhouse filled with lime green (#ecf874) code-plants. A chunky pixel robot companion holds up a mobile phone displaying a quiz. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
